List all dynamic tables for the current user

post.summary: Resolve relation values across tables (batch lookup)
Additively evolve an installed table's schema from its preset (admin-only)
post.description: Computes the additive delta (new fields + new select options) between the preset module and the user's installed table identified by internalName, then applies it via the engine's revalidating schema update. Never removes/renames fields or options. Idempotent: a second call with no preset changes is a no-op. Requires ADMIN role.

internalName.description: Stable preset key of the installed table (e.g. 'leads')

post.summary: Install ONE new table from its preset into an already-installed tenant (admin-only)
post.description: Idempotently installs a single preset table (identified by internalName) for the current tenant. If the table already exists it is a no-op (created=false). Relation markers (@@PRESET_TABLE_KEY::x) are resolved to the user's REAL installed table ids; a missing dependency table yields 404. Requires ADMIN role.

internalName.description: Stable preset key of the table to install (e.g. 'crmOpportunities')

Get all data rows for a dynamic table

post.summary: Create a new data row in a dynamic table

schema.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs matching the table schema fields

put.summary: Update a data row in a dynamic table

schema.description: Fields to update – merges with existing row data

delete.summary: Delete a data row from a dynamic table

post.summary: Soft-delete multiple data rows in a dynamic table (atomic)
post.description: Deletes up to 200 rows in a single transaction. Every id must belong to the given table and the caller; if any id is cross-tenant or foreign the whole batch rolls back (404).

post.summary: Create a new dashboard (installs table preset suite for the user)
post.description: Accepts either a quick creation payload (suiteKey) or a custom preset payload (presetKey + optional removedTables / addedFields). Returns 403 if the user already has tables configured.

post.summary: Cancel a finalized salon sale (status → Cancelled; reverses the revenue entry)

reason.description: Optional reason recorded on the sale (audit).

post.summary: Return a finalized salon sale (status → Returned; books a contra-revenue entry)

reason.description: Optional reason recorded on the sale (audit).

post.summary: Register payment for a finalized salon sale (paymentStatus → Paid; books the settlement entry)
post.description: The only sanctioned path to move a Finalized sale to Paid. Performs a whitelisted isSystem write (paymentStatus/paymentMethod/paidAt/paidByUserId/paymentReference) and, post-commit, books D <account by paymentMethod> / C 1.1.2 A Receber (sourceType salon.sale.settled). Settlement is deferred if the revenue entry does not yet exist.

paidAt.description: ISO datetime the payment occurred (settlement date). Defaults to now.

post.summary: Post a balanced double-entry journal entry
post.description: ΣdebitCents must equal ΣcreditCents (exact integer equality). Idempotent on (sourceType, sourceId) per unit.

data.description: The posted journal entry with its postings

post.summary: Reverse a posted journal entry (estorno)
post.description: Posted entries are immutable; corrections are made via a reversing entry. Idempotent — reversing twice returns the existing reversal.

200.description: Reversing entry created (or the existing one if already reversed)

get.summary: Trial balance (balancete) for a unit
get.description: Aggregates Posted + Reversed postings (Draft excluded) per account.

get.summary: Per-account ledger (razão) for a unit
List the chart of accounts for a unit

post.summary: Create a user-defined account in the chart of accounts

delete.description: unitId is required so the delete is scoped to its unit. Canonical accounts and accounts with postings cannot be deleted.

409.description: Account is canonical or has postings — cannot be deleted

get.summary: List journal entries (lançamentos) for a unit, paginated
